import React from 'react' import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' import "../../../App.css" import './myitems.css' export default function Items({MyfilteredItems} ) { return (
{MyfilteredItems.map(item => (

{item.name}

Owner: {item.person} Base Price:₹{item.base_price}
Brought Price: ₹{item.current_price}
))}
) }
